This is full list from:
ng_bpf_enable="YES"
ng_bpf_profiles="lan0"
ng_bpf_lan0_in="ip and tcp and tcp port 80 and tcp[1024] != 0"
ng_bpf_lan0_out="ip and tcp and tcp port 80 and tcp[1024] != 0"

My original config was:
ng_bpf_enable="YES"
ng_bpf_profiles="vlan886"
ng_bpf_vlan886_in="ip and tcp and ip[6] & 64 = 0 and ip[8]>128 and tcp[tcpflags] == tcp-rst"
it filters only incoming from internet packets from intel i211 adapter.
